panel.title: USB Manager
panel.empty-hint: Plug in a USB drive to get started

settings.hide-when-empty-desc: Hide the bar icon when no USB devices are connected
settings.show-badge-desc: Show the number of mounted devices as a badge on the bar icon
settings.icon-color-desc: Custom icon color (leave as 'none' for default)
settings.auto-mount-desc: Automatically mount USB drives when plugged in
settings.notifications-desc: Show toast notifications for mount/unmount/eject events
settings.file-browser-desc: Command used to open the file browser (e.g. yazi, ranger, xdg-open, dolphin)
settings.terminal-desc: Terminal used to open terminal-based file managers (yazi, ranger, etc.)
